toolRequests.name: bash

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. Two binlog files were created:

- **`Debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build log
- **`Release.binlog`** — Release configuration build log

You can inspect them with `dotnet build-server` or the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
